recommendations.title: So Long, My Son
recommendations.overview: Two married couples adjust to the vast social and economic changes taking place in China from the 1980s to the present.

recommendations.title: The Prize of Peril
recommendations.overview: In a futuristic society, contestants pit their survival skills against each other in a fight to the death for cash prizes, and the contest is aired live on television.

recommendations.title: The Humanity Bureau
recommendations.overview: In 2030 the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

recommendations.title: The Decline
recommendations.overview: Anticipating a disaster, Antoine, a father, attends a survivalist training given by Alain in his autonomous hideout. In fear of a natural, economic or social crisis, the group trains to face the different possible apocalyptic scenarios. But the disas

recommendations.title: Captain Nova
recommendations.overview: A fighter pilot travels back in time to save the future world from environmental disaster, but a side-effect turns her young again and no-one takes her seriously.

recommendations.title: Restore Point
recommendations.overview: It’s 2041 and the gaps in social and economic inequality have left the world on the brink. A breakthrough in science has given humanity the ability to bring victims of a violent crime back to life by backing up their brain every 2 days. This allows a

recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: The Nice Guys
recommendations.overview: A private eye investigates the apparent suicide of a fading porn star in 1970s Los Angeles and uncovers a conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Mulholland Drive
recommendations.overview: Blonde Betty Elms has only just arrived in Hollywood to become a movie star when she meets an enigmatic brunette with amnesia. Meanwhile, as the two set off to solve the second woman's identity, filmmaker Adam Kesher runs into ominous trouble while c

recommendations.title: Right at Your Door
recommendations.overview: A dirty bomb goes off in Los Angeles, jamming freeways and spreading a toxic cloud.
